candidates.mutation_note: Tightened the sensory_text guidance to require inclusion of product note lists/headline flavor notes and to exclude non-sensory origin, process, roast, brew, and marketing sentences unless they are primarily sensory.
gate_reasons: suite repair test not significant: 1 repairs vs 2 breakages (one-sided p=0.875, need <0.05)

candidates.mutation_note: Tightened the sensory_text guidance to include explicit tasting-note lists plus sensory cup-description sentences, and to exclude adjacent origin/process/brewing/marketing prose that lacks sensory descriptors.
gate_reasons: suite repair test not significant: 1 repairs vs 4 breakages (one-sided p=0.969, need <0.05)
critical gold field regression: price.listed_price 0.975 -> 0.925 (beyond 0.038 = max(band, 1.5/n))

candidates.mutation_note: Expanded the sensory_text guidance to require collecting labeled/near-title tasting notes plus cup/flavor descriptions in page order, while excluding brew recipes and non-sensory origin/process/marketing prose or trimming to sensory clauses when mixed.
gate_reasons: suite repair test not significant: 1 repairs vs 4 breakages (one-sided p=0.969, need <0.05)
critical gold field regression: price.listed_price 0.975 -> 0.925 (beyond 0.038 = max(band, 1.5/n))

candidates.mutation_note: Tightened the sensory_text instruction to include headline tasting-note lists plus sensory cup/flavor sentences, while excluding adjacent origin, producer, process, roast-intent, and brew-recipe prose unless the text itself is sensory.
gate_reasons: suite repair test not significant: 3 repairs vs 2 breakages (one-sided p=0.500, need <0.05)

candidates.mutation_note: Expanded the sensory_text instruction to include labeled/prominent tasting note lists while excluding adjacent non-sensory prose and extracting only sensory clauses from mixed paragraphs.
gate_reasons: suite repair test not significant: 2 repairs vs 4 breakages (one-sided p=0.891, need <0.05)

candidates.mutation_note: Tightened the sensory_text guidance to always include prominent labeled/top tasting notes and cup-descriptor sentences while excluding origin/processing/brewing/roast/marketing context unless the sentence itself is sensory.
gate_reasons: suite repair test not significant: 2 repairs vs 5 breakages (one-sided p=0.938, need <0.05)

candidates.mutation_note: Tightened the sensory_text instruction to include explicit product tasting-note lines plus sensory cup sentences, while excluding non-sensory production/roast/brew prose and related-product notes.
gate_reasons: suite repair test not significant: 2 repairs vs 2 breakages (one-sided p=0.688, need <0.05)
critical gold field regression: price.listed_price 0.975 -> 0.925 (beyond 0.038 = max(band, 1.5/n))

candidates.mutation_note: Tightened the sensory_text guidance to require inclusion of explicit tasting-note blocks and to exclude non-sensory origin/process/brew prose except for sentences or clauses that actually describe cup attributes.
gate_reasons: suite repair test not significant: 2 repairs vs 5 breakages (one-sided p=0.938, need <0.05)

candidates.mutation_note: Tightened the sensory_text guidance to include explicit product tasting-note lists/taglines and only sensory cup-description sentences/clauses, excluding adjacent origin/process/brew/context and related-product notes.
gate_reasons: suite repair test not significant: 0 repairs vs 3 breakages (one-sided p=1.000, need <0.05)
